programme.desc: Pilgrim lidera la cacería del casi herido a muerte Sunny. La Viuda se enfrenta a sus demonios interiores en un intento de restaurar el Don.

programme.title: Into the Badlands
programme.desc: Sunny, Bajie y Gaius buscan a un aliado improbable en la lucha contra Pilgrim. Cressida tiene una revelación perturbadora. La Viuda se cuestiona el futuro.

programme.title: Into the Badlands
programme.desc: Sunny, la Viuda y Bajie lideran la carga contra Pilgrim, mientras él intenta obtener el control definitivo de los Badlands. M.K. busca vengarse de la Viuda.

programme.title: Into the Badlands

programme.title: Into the Badlands
programme.desc: MK encuentra refugio en un lugar inesperado y peligroso, mientras que la lealtad de Sunny se pone a prueba cuando Quinn intenta obligarlo a cometer un acto incalificable.

programme.title: Acapulco Shore
programme.desc: Unas nuevas vacaciones comienzan para los Shore y en esta ocasión, Acapulco será testigo de las fiestas, amores, desamores y peleas de la familia más disfuncional de la televisión.

programme.title: Acapulco Shore
programme.desc: La fiesta continua y el capitán desata la primera crisis en la casa. La tensión entre Isa y Fernanda crece con un descenlace inesperado y la llegada de Nacha sorprende a todos en la casa.

programme.title: Acapulco Shore
programme.desc: El boss aparece por primera vez. Los Shores descubren que la casa tiene un antro. La relación entre Alba y Fer se hace más fuerte mientras que Nacha le deja saber a Jacky que se le hace una falsa.

programme.title: Acapulco Shore
programme.desc: El capitán regresa a la casa Shore. Un viaje en Catamarán genera un enfrentamiento entre Alba y Chile, mientras que a Fernanda le dañan una noche de pasión y Nacha explota contra Jacky.

programme.title: Acapulco Shore
programme.desc: Jaylin se abre con los Shores y les cuenta su historia. El grupo se relaja en un beach club pero los problemas siguen. Jaylin y Capitán discuten y la situación entre Nacha y Jacky se sale de control.

programme.title: Acapulco Shore
programme.desc: Los Shores vuelven a la casa en autobús y lo que parecía que iba a ser un viaje relajado y divertido, se convierte en un todos contra todos. El Boss se presenta oficialmente y un nuevo integrante llega.

programme.title: Acapulco Shore
programme.desc: El Team Tendo le organiza una fiesta de 15 a su Matrioska y los Shores se entregan al festejo como solo ellos saben hacerlo. Todo es diversión hasta que una discusión inesperada excede todos los límites.

programme.title: Acapulco Shore
programme.desc: Con la reciente expulsión de Capitán y las mujeres arrancándose las extensiones completamente fuera de sí, los shores prometen descontrolar Acapulco como si fuera la primera vez.

programme.title: Acapulco Shore
programme.desc: La Matrioska agasaja a sus amigos y organiza un picnic inclusivo, en el cual los Shores abren sus corazones. Con el ánimo al tope, los Shores desfilan por Acapulco y organizan la iniciación de Isa.

programme.title: Acapulco Shore

programme.title: Acapulco Shore

programme.title: Acapulco Shore

programme.title: Lockup: Colorado: Extended Stay
programme.desc: When Travis Trani took charge in 2008 he oversaw the implementation of several new policies; the restrictions on movement were among the toughest; inmates from the six different housing units could no longer freely move throughout the prison.

programme.title: Lockup: Colorado: Extended Stay

programme.title: Lockup: Colorado: Extended Stay

programme.title: Lockup: Colorado: Extended Stay

programme.title: Lockup: Colorado: Extended Stay
programme.desc: Even for inmates serving hard time, love can be a strong motivator; in prison, reaching out to others can be a dicey proposition; some inmates just don't know when someone's getting too close until it's too late.

programme.desc: Sean reveals a secret to Jenna that could threaten his job. Allie and Jason fly her helicopter to the big island where they have to rescue four people trapped on a volcanic lava reef.

programme.title: Baywatch Hawaii
programme.desc: Jessie tries to overcome her condition to compete in the Maui triathlon with Dawn as her coach. Allie suspects an agenda behind Dawn's motives. Jason and Kekoa seek a mysterious underwater Hawaiian spirit that lures people to their deaths.

programme.title: Baywatch Hawaii
programme.desc: Sean tries to keep his relationship with Jenna a secret. When the team has to rescue swimmers trapped in a filtration tube, Jenna is sucked down a shaft and Sean risks everything to save her, revealing his darkest secret.

programme.title: Baywatch Hawaii
programme.desc: No longer able to cope with his guilt of surviving the attack on Pearl Harbor, Jessie's grandfather comes to Hawaii to end his life. Can Mitch intervene in time? Kekoa and Sean help a college basketball player learn to swim.

programme.title: Baywatch Hawaii
programme.desc: Mitch goes undercover to stop an ex-Navy SEAL turned eco-terrorist from detonating a deadly underwater explosive device. When Mitch's dive gear floats to the surface, Sean and the team fear the worst.

programme.title: Baywatch Hawaii
programme.desc: Sean clashes with Jenna. A new love triangle emerges between new recruit Zack and rookie hopeful Carrie, who’s more interested in Jason. Sean and new lifeguard Leigh Dwyer confront daredevil Cliff, whose dangerous antics disrupt the Baywatch team.

programme.title: Baywatch Hawaii
programme.desc: A teenager's waverunner causes accidents and his father threatens to sue Baywatch for not rescuing him ahead of his victims. JD takes out his personal problems on Sean. Zack relentlessly pursues Carrie while she pursues Jason.

programme.title: Baywatch Hawaii
programme.desc: Sean and Jenna clash when she tries to close Baywatch so investors can develop the property. Carrie is afraid she's not lifeguard material after her reluctance to jump into the water from a hovering helicopter.

programme.title: Baywatch Hawaii
programme.desc: Leigh goes hang gliding with Sam Parks, a daredevil pilot who puts her life in danger. Things go horribly wrong when Kekoa's cousin, Nani, parties on a boat with drunken frat boys and ends up alone in the ocean.

programme.title: Baywatch Hawaii
programme.desc: A plane carrying a donor's heart crashes, and it’s up to Jason to make a desperate dive to retrieve the heart before the patient dies. Two hooligans steal a car and end up trapped underwater. Jenna tries to get Leigh to turn against Sean.

programme.title: Baywatch Hawaii
programme.desc: To avoid jail, Danny joins Team Baywatch. Leigh doesn't trust him. Kekoa battles her father over her lifeguard career and moves out. JD, Zack, and Jason hustle two gorgeous women who turn out to be con artists who turn the tables on them.

programme.title: Baywatch Hawaii
programme.desc: Jenna convinces ruthless Councilman McKenna to close the Training Center. Sean suspends Zack after he severely injures JD during a rescue. Kekoa expresses her deep love for JD – but to Leigh! Zack sees a ghostly woman from his dreams.

programme.title: Bellator MMA Full Fight Cards
programme.desc: Heavyweight legends Frank Mir and Roy “Big Country” Nelson collide in a highly anticipated rematch from Mohegan Sun. While Phil “Mr. Wonderful” Davis, “Easy” Ed Ruth, “Rowdy” Bec Rawlings, and pro wrestler Jake Hager return to the cage.

programme.title: Bellator MMA Full Fight Cards
programme.desc: Bellator MMA comes to the Mohegan Sun Arena with an explosive night of fights. The Bellator Welterweight Grand Prix concludes in the main event as current Champion Rory MacDonald takes on the former Champ Douglas Lima in a winner-takes-all bout.

programme.title: Bellator MMA Full Fight Cards
programme.desc: Bellator MMA takes place from WinStar World Casino in Oklahoma as middleweight submission specialist John Salter meets Holland’s Costello van Steenis. And don’t miss former Strikeforce World Champion King Mo’s final fight as he takes on Andrew Kapel

programme.title: Bellator MMA Full Fight Cards
programme.desc: AJ McKee takes on Derek Campos in the Quarter Finals of the Featherweight World Grand Prix. Then in the main event hometown hero, Ilima Lei MacFarlane defends her Flyweight belt against Kate Jackson.

programme.title: Bellator 237: Fedor vs Rampage
programme.desc: East meets West when Bellator MMA invades Tokyo with a stacked card that features MMA superstar Fedor Emelianenko and Rampage Jackson colliding in a long-awaited showdown. Also in action are Bellator stars Michael Chandler and Michael “MVP” Page.

programme.title: Bellator MMA Full Fight Cards
programme.desc: Bellator MMA comes to the Forum in LA. Darrion Caldwell takes on Adam Borics in the quarter-finals of the Featherweight World Grand Prix. In the main event, Julia Budd defends her Featherweight World Title against Cris Cyborg.

programme.title: Bellator MMA Full Fight Cards
programme.desc: Known for their impressive fast finishes, 'Easy' Ed Ruth meets undefeated Yaroslav Amosov in anything but an easy fight as the two face off in the welterweight main event.

programme.title: Bellator 242: Bandejas vs Pettis
programme.desc: Bellator MMA is back from the Mohegan Sun Arena with a night of fast-paced action as Sergio Pettis battles Ricky Bandejas in a bantamweight title-elimination fight, while Jason Jackson clashes with dangerous veteran Jordan Mein at welterweight.

programme.title: Bellator 243: Chandler vs Henderson II
programme.desc: Former MMA World Champions Michael Chandler and Benson Henderson look to settle things once and for all after their first unforgettable battle ended in a razor-thin split decision in Chandler’s favor.

programme.title: Dr. Phil
programme.desc: Lisa says she can't choose between her boyfriend of 1 year or her husband of 26 years. She claims husband Rick is verbally abusive, & controlling. Rick says he will do whatever it takes to keep her from this other man. Whom will Lisa choose?

programme.title: Dr. Phil
programme.desc: Monica's old life: English teacher, marathon runner, happy. Now 90 lbs. and no solid food with a C-diff diagnosis, she chains herself to bed to avoid sleepwalking or binge eating. It's a full-time job for mom, Stephanie; friend Breanna suspects enabling.

programme.title: Dr. Phil
programme.desc: Dr. Phil continues with Courtney who says former friend Amie fabricated several pregnancies and baby deaths. Dr. Phil asks Amie why there are no death records of her deceased children. Why did Amie walk off stage and explosively meltdown backstage? Part 2

programme.title: Dr. Phil
programme.desc: In 2014, former live-in nanny Diane Stretton made headlines when she refused to move out of Marcella Bracamonte's home. The women come face-to-face on Dr. Phil's stage. Who's the victim in this mother vs. nanny feud?

programme.title: Dr. Phil
programme.desc: Tiffany & Sheka aren't alone in accusations ex-boyfriend Erik lies & scams constantly. Dr. Phil talks to ex-girlfriends Torri & Courtney & ex-wife, Martha, all sharing in Erik's deceitful behavior. Erik's revealed as an alleged con man--will he change?

programme.title: Dr. Phil
programme.desc: Dr. Phil shines a light on domestic violence speaking with Kaitlyn, defending her pro-fighter husband, Josh, while he's being held in jail without bail. And hear Trichelle, facing 20 years in prison after she says she killed her husband in self-defense.

programme.title: Dr. Phil
programme.desc: Brad says he can't choose between his wife, Michele, and his girlfriend, who's calling herself "Sarah" to protect her identity. Pt.1

programme.title: Dr. Phil
programme.desc: People, eager to give opinions, can lose an entire career with just one tweet. Kathy won Miss Michigan 2019 but lost the crown the next day because of comments she made on social media.Plus, Carissa's transphobic posts derailed her dreams.

programme.title: Dr. Phil
programme.desc: Donna has extreme hatred for her daughter-in-law, Jen, and it's coming between her relationship with her son, Brad. Jen & Brad say they're so terrified of Donna, they changed the locks and sleep with a gun. Can Dr. Phil calm these feuding in-laws?

programme.title: Dr. Phil
programme.desc: Crystal accuses her ex-boyfriend, Anthony, of sexually assaulting their 3-year-old daughter. Crystal says she has proof confirming Anthony as the monster she says he is. Anthony says Crystal is “crazy and a liar.” Can Dr. Phil expose the truth? Part 1

programme.title: Dr. Phil
programme.desc: Heather says husband Anthony put rubbing alcohol in her contact lens case, which he denies. Anthony says he does have anger issues after returning from Iraq & admits to abuse of Heather's dog. Robin McGraw issues a strong warning about domestic violence.

programme.title: Dr. Phil
programme.desc: Child abductions are a reality, & friends, neighbors & even relatives can kidnap your youngster. Two victims share heart-wrenching stories of abduction & how they were returned to their families. Find out what you need to know to keep your child safe!

programme.title: Dr. Phil
programme.desc: In a Dr. Phil first, a catfish who orchestrated several online dating deceptions faces her victims, in-studio. Plus, Ryan's ex-girlfriend, Holly, falsely accused him of posting intimate photographs & videos of her online after they broke up. Ryan speaks.

programme.title: Dr. Phil
programme.desc: Rachel says she hates her mother, Aundrea, who is an embarrassment, and who stole her childhood due to her alcoholism & a pill addiction. Aundrea admits she's an alcoholic and a liar, & says she is keeping two dark and embarrassing secrets.

channel.display-name: Best of The Drew Barrymore Show

programme.title: The Drew Barrymore Show
programme.desc: Comedian Celeste Barber, known for her hilarious celebrity parodies, joins Drew and Ross Mathews at the news desk to cover the latest headlines including the one perk employees most wish their employer would offer and share Rihanna's latest collab.

programme.title: The Drew Barrymore Show
programme.desc: Shotgun Wedding" star D'Arcy Carden is joining Drew and Ross Mathews at the news desk to cover today's hottest stories like the woman who invited all her ex-boyfriends to her wedding and put them at a table together and the newest trend of eating alone.

programme.title: The Drew Barrymore Show
programme.desc: At Midnight" star Whitney Cummings is joining Drew to take a bungee fitness class! She's also covering the news with Drew and Ross Mathews at the Drew's News desk including why women may smell different after leaving a boyfriend's place.

programme.title: The Drew Barrymore Show
programme.desc: Drew and Bill Nye The Science Guy are serving the news sunny-side up in an all new Drew's News. Then, Chef Pilar Valdes reveals five essential pantry items and turns them into a delicious dish.

programme.title: The Drew Barrymore Show
programme.desc: Drew and Ross Mathews are at the Drew's News desk and covering the hottest topics. Stephanie Izard is joining Drew in the kitchen to make something delicious. Eve Rodsky is sharing home equity tips.

programme.title: The Drew Barrymore Show
programme.desc: The Equalizer" star Queen Latifah stops by to chat. Plus, Drew and Ross Mathews are serving the news sunny-side up in an all new Drew's News. Then, In A Minute Ross is sharing an all new delicious Rossipe.

programme.title: The Drew Barrymore Show
programme.desc: Horticulturist Christopher Freimuth shares holiday decor tips. Drew & Ross report on E.T. auction & benefits of being in the rain. James Warren talks about building benches at local bus stops.

programme.title: The Drew Barrymore Show
programme.desc: Drew and Ross Mathews are serving today's news sunny-side up. Danny Seo is sharing three under $30 bathroom essentials and tips for how to clean your toilet better.

programme.title: The Drew Barrymore Show
programme.desc: Fashion Icon Victoria Beckham is dishing on her Paris Fashion Week debut, that signature leg pose, her daughter's thoughts on her Spice Girls wardrobe and more!

programme.title: The Drew Barrymore Show
programme.desc: Plane" star Gerard Butler is chatting about his new film. Drew and Ross Mathews are serving the news sunny-side up and covering the week's hottest headlines.

programme.title: The Drew Barrymore Show
programme.desc: We're celebrating the Oscars and style sheriffs Melissa Rivers, Law Roach and Christian Siriano are joining Drew and Ross Mathews for a special fashion panel.

programme.title: The Drew Barrymore Show
programme.desc: Champions" director Bobby Farrelly is talking to Drew and joined by cast members Madison Tevlin, Kevin Iannucci and Joshua Felder to chat about the film. Drew and Ross Mathews are serving the news sunny-side up in an all-new Drew's News.

programme.title: The Drew Barrymore Show
programme.desc: Drew is joined by Garcelle Beauva is for a special female empowerment edition of Drew's News. "Claiming Space" author and mentor Eliza Van Cort is sharing tips for female empowerment and how to claim your space.

programme.title: The Drew Barrymore Show
programme.desc: Emily in Paris" stars Lily Collins, Ashley Park, Philippine Leroy-Beaulieu and Lucas Bravo are joining Drew for a round of Drew & A. Pilar Valdes is joining Drew in the kitchen to whip up some yummy crepes.

programme.title: The Drew Barrymore Show
programme.desc: Drew and Cameron Diaz cook and chat about their culinary adventures. Andrea Lavinthal recreates Drew's past looks.

programme.title: The Drew Barrymore Show
programme.desc: Entertainment Tonight's Kevin Frazier and Nischelle Turner are joining Drew and Ross Mathews at the Drew's News desk for a special Oscars themed Drew's News, sharing their predictions for the awards show.

programme.title: The Drew Barrymore Show
programme.desc: Drew is chatting with actress Katherine Heiglabout the return of "Firefly Lane" and more.Plus, inan all-new Drew's News, Katherine Heigl joinsDrew and Ross Mathewsat the news desk to hit the headlines.

programme.title: The Drew Barrymore Show
programme.desc: Curtis "50 Cent" Jackson is filling in for Drew as co-host for the day! Comedian Ziwe Fumudoh stops by to chat about the new season of her late-night talk show "Ziwe.

programme.title: The Drew Barrymore Show
programme.desc: Lena Dunham on her new medieval comedy film "Catherine Called Birdy." Plus, Drew and Ross Mathews are serving the news sunny-side up in an all new Drew's News.

programme.title: The Drew Barrymore Show
programme.desc: Paris in Love" star Paris Hilton joins Drew to chat. Then, CBS News Anchor Michelle Miller is helping Drew and Ross hit the headlines at the Drew's News desk.

programme.title: The Drew Barrymore Show
programme.desc: Drew and Ross Mathews are serving the news sunny-side up in an all new Drew's News. Then, upcycling expert Sarah Teresinski is transforming items off the street that she found on the Stooping NYC Instagram page.

programme.title: The Drew Barrymore Show
programme.desc: Magnolia Network's" Joanna Gaines and Drew are going roller skating and chatting everything home renovation.

programme.title: The Drew Barrymore Show
programme.desc: Plus, in an all-new Cookbook Club Molly Yeh joins Drew in the kitchen to whip up a yummy and comforting dish from her new cookbook, "Home is Where the Eggs Are.

programme.title: The Drew Barrymore Show
programme.desc: Actor Justice Smith joins Drew and he's dishing about his latest film, "Dungeons and Dragons." Drew and Ross Mathews are joined by Ali Landry at the Drew's News desk as they serve the news sunny-side up.

programme.title: The Drew Barrymore Show
programme.desc: It's a special edition of Drew's News on location at Comic Con with iconic actress and star of "Halloween Ends" Jamie Lee Curtis joining Drew at the news desk.

programme.title: The Drew Barrymore Show
programme.desc: Chef Sophia Roe is joining Drew in the kitchen to whip up something delicious. Drew and Ross Mathews are hitting the headlines in Drew's News and sharing their best weekend suggestions.

programme.title: The Drew Barrymore Show
programme.desc: Drew & Ross Mathews host Drew MerryMore X People Magazine Holiday Giveaway. Studio audience of Drew-gooders get $300K in gifts. Drew highlights Drew-Gooders making difference in community.

programme.title: The Beverly Hillbillies
programme.desc: Jed and Granny decide to donate the burden of their millions to some college students and move back home.

programme.title: The Beverly Hillbillies
programme.desc: When Crowfoot Indians come to Beverly Hills to discuss a boundary dispute at the Clampett oil field, Granny prepares for war.

programme.title: The Beverly Hillbillies
programme.desc: After reading the Society page, Granny decides the best way to get Elly a husband is to throw her a coming out party, complete with possum burgers and gopher gravy. Mrs. Drysdale, hoping to forever humiliate them, is all too happy to help.

programme.title: The Beverly Hillbillies
programme.desc: The Clampketts come across Narda and Yerko, two gypsies, who decide to run a scam on the unsuspecting clan. Involving both a marriage prophecy and a curse, the crooks see the families' naivety to their advantage.

programme.title: The Beverly Hillbillies
programme.desc: The Clampetts are visited by a real king, Alexander, so Granny and Mrs. Drysdale start matchmaking. The broke royal needs a wealthy bride and courts Ellie. Drysdale niece Doreen is tricked by a costumed Jethro and ends up unimpressed.

programme.title: The Beverly Hillbillies
programme.desc: The Clampetts acquire a hippopotamus when an advertising scheme originated by banker Drysdale backfires.

programme.title: The Beverly Hillbillies
programme.desc: Banker Milburn 'Drysdale's precocious 11-year-old nephew swindles the hillbillies of all the valuable art objects in their mansion.

programme.title: The Beverly Hillbillies
programme.desc: Jed Clampett has inherited a castle in the English countryside. Jethro insists that everyone, except Granny, wear the royal raiment's of Elizabeth (the First, of course).

programme.title: The Beverly Hillbillies
programme.desc: The Clampetts head to England to visit the castle Jed inherited. Misunderstandings abound, from Jethro mistaking San Francisco for London, to the impounding of Granny's medical supplies, to the real intentions of the elderly chemist.

programme.title: The Beverly Hillbillies
programme.desc: The Clampetts finally make it to their new castle and try to adjust to the English way of castle life, at the least the way Jethro thinks it is, based on his understanding of English myths and legends.

programme.title: The Beverly Hillbillies
programme.desc: When Jethro gets his draft notice, Jed decides he should pay what it costs the Army to train inductees. When Mr. Drysdale hears this, he starts figuring how he can get Jethro out on a Section 8.

programme.title: The Beverly Hillbillies
programme.desc: Jethro reports to the induction center after getting his draft notice. The Army isn't quite sure what to make of Jethro.

programme.title: The Beverly Hillbillies
programme.desc: Since Granny can't plant crops in their yard, Jed thinks the solution is to buy her a plot a land somewhere else. He figures a place called Happy Acres is the best spot to buy land, not realizing it's a cemetery.

programme.title: The Beverly Hillbillies
programme.desc: Jethro thinks he wants to be a naval frogman, but Granny is concerned her tonic has transformed him. Mr. Drysdale, concerned about finances, has Miss Jane distract Jethro with comics, causing him to want to fly to the moon.

programme.title: The Beverly Hillbillies
programme.desc: Jethro heads down to the Reserves HQ while wearing an ancestor's Confederate Army uniform. The Sergeant thinks he's an actor there to participate in a Civil War reenactment. Jethro runs home to tell Granny the Civil War is still on.

programme.title: The Beverly Hillbillies
programme.desc: Col. Blake asks the actor playing Gen. Grant to play along with Granny so that the Civil War movie can continue. Meanwhile, Jethro uses his 6th grade education to take the written test to enter the Reserves.

programme.title: The Beverly Hillbillies
programme.desc: Jethro believes his moment for Hollywood stardom has arrived. Casting for Bachelor Sheriff Knows Best is occurring, and Jethro mistakenly thinks he has been chosen.

programme.title: The Beverly Hillbillies
programme.desc: Granny competes against Mrs. Drysdale as artists and tells Jed about her uncle, the barn painter. Jed and Jethro go to an upscale gallery to buy a painting, but are mistaken for gardeners. Bessie the chimp dabbles with a paintbrush.

programme.title: The Beverly Hillbillies
programme.desc: After Ellie seems to be no longer interested in Dash Riprock Granny decides it's time to do a little matchmaking. She thinks the handsome actor would be perfect for Miss Jane.

programme.title: The Beverly Hillbillies
programme.desc: Mr. Drysdale talks the Clampetts into hiring a housekeeper. Unfortunately, the housekeeper that is hired is uninterested in doing housework.

programme.title: The Beverly Hillbillies
programme.desc: Granny's old friend, the widow Adaline Ashley, comes to Beverly Hills, and Granny sets to playing matchmaker for her and Jed. Mrs. Drysdale and her snooty friends are misled to believe Adaline is a socialite jet-setter.

programme.title: The Beverly Hillbillies
programme.desc: Jethro decides to turn his favorite thing, eating, into a job by getting the family involved in buying a diner. The family's choice of offerings lead to a lack of customers, so Mr. Drysdale tries to fix things.

programme.title: The Beverly Hillbillies
programme.desc: Jethro, worried that his diner the Hungry Gizzard has no customers, has a wonderful idea. He busts in on Mr. Drysdale trying to impress the wealthy Vanderpools, announcing the restaurant is going topless. Confusion ensues.

programme.title: The Beverly Hillbillies
programme.desc: Granny wants to leave sunny California because she misses winter, sending Mr. Drysdale into a panic. The banker enlists Miss Jane in an elaborate scheme to convince the Clampetts that a blizzard has occurred.

programme.title: The Beverly Hillbillies
programme.desc: The last televised wrestling match was such a success that the promoter wants a rematch. Granny isn't interested until Rebecca's parents visit.

programme.title: The Beverly Hillbillies
programme.desc: Granny is worried about Miss Jane's spinsterhood and convinces Jethro to ask her to marry him. Granny assures him that she will decline the proposal, but Hathaway accepts, leading to panic in the Clampett household.

programme.title: The Beverly Hillbillies
programme.desc: Granny is on the warpath concerning the chaos caused by Ellie's critters and declares either they go or she does. Mr. Drysdale is equally irritated by the expense of his wife's poodle. Jed tries to find a solution.

programme.title: Beverly Hills 90210
programme.desc: Cindy surprises Brandon by coming to visit for Christmas. Joe tries to keep an antsy Donna in suspense about her Christmas/birthday present.

programme.title: Beverly Hills 90210
programme.desc: Kelly's father swoops into town, and once again sweeps her off of her feet with promises of a relationship. Nat is reunited with an old-flame.

programme.title: Beverly Hills 90210
programme.desc: Kelly takes refuge back with Colin, and ends up on a bender.

programme.title: Beverly Hills 90210
programme.desc: Susan is nominated for a college journalism award for her story about a girl's decision to have an abortion. Valerie arranges a meeting between Colin and a knowledgeable art buyer in the hopes of encouraging Colin to get clean and focus on his career.

programme.title: Beverly Hills 90210
programme.desc: Valerie's really annoying friend Ginger returns to town. Clare and Donna confront Kelly after finding drugs in the apartment. Brandon, Steve and Joe accept Jonathan's invitation to go flying in biplanes.

programme.title: Beverly Hills 90210
programme.desc: Valerie tries to pacify Ginger by setting her up with Jonathan. Donna's sorority asks students to go without sex for 24 hours in order to promote abstinence as a means of preventing venereal diseases. Clare bets that Steve cannot make good on his pledge.

programme.title: Beverly Hills 90210
programme.desc: Colin visits Kelly and announces that he has kicked his cocaine habit. Kelly gets a roommate, a troubled teenage runaway named Tara. Valerie has the house to herself as Steve and Brandon leave for a ski weekend with Clare, Susan and David.

programme.title: Beverly Hills 90210
programme.desc: Brandon and Susan spend the weekend at her parents' house. Colin and Valerie's new relationship upsets David and Kelly. Joe's older brother Hank comes to town and tries to discourage him from undergoing surgery.

programme.title: Beverly Hills 90210
programme.desc: Valerie puts the club up as collateral to bail Colin out of jail. Kelly comes home from rehab and Donna is put off by the frequent phone calls from a lonely Tara. Clare, Susan, Brandon and Steve organize a romantic evening for the Nat and Joan.

programme.title: Beverly Hills 90210
programme.desc: Rush dumps Ryan and Austin off on Steve on the same day that he is hosting a fraternity party. Kelly invites Tara to stay with her after she finishes her stint in rehab.

programme.title: Beverly Hills 90210
programme.desc: Brandon, Steve, and Joe go on a camping trip with Susan, Clare, and Donna. The girls become jealous when the guys repeatedly ignore them to help some damsels in distress. Tara sabotages Kelly's relationship with Greg.

programme.title: Beverly Hills 90210
programme.desc: Colin tries to remain strong as he prepares to turn himself in and begin his prison term. Brandon and Susan lose a five-thousand-dollar lottery ticket, leading to a major argument.

programme.title: Beverly Hills 90210
programme.desc: Kelly agrees to help with the search for Colin when Brandon reveals that Nat could fall victim to the bail bondsman through his business ties to Valerie. Donna balks when she and David are asked to produce a music video for Ray.

programme.title: Beverly Hills 90210
programme.desc: Brandon and Steve run into a bit of trouble when their car breaks down. Donna works with David on a video shoot, and the singer isn't the only one that is hard to deal with.

programme.title: Black Ink Crew
programme.desc: Ceaser faces Dutchess for the first time since she kicked him out of the apartment. Dutchess decides to see a plastic surgeon about breast implants. O'S**t decides it's time to get all three of his baby mamas together for a dinner. Presented by VH1.

programme.title: Black Ink Crew
programme.desc: O'S**t's past has come back to haunt him when a mystery woman turns up at the shop. While Dutch reconnects with everyone but Ceaser. During the party, Cease and Puma have an idea that has the potential to change Black Ink's future. Presented by VH1.

programme.title: Black Ink Crew
programme.desc: With Dutchess doing her own thing, Ceaser focuses on the shop and all of the drama that comes with it. An already crazy mixxxy party gets interesting when O'S**t and new shop apprentice Donna are caught in the bathroom together. Presented by VH1.

programme.title: Black Ink Crew
programme.desc: O'S**t's attorney, Paul Lieber, pulls some strings in the courtroom in attempt to get O'S**t out of his legal mess. Dutchess invites Quani on her upcoming trip to Paris. Presented by VH1.

programme.title: Black Ink Crew
programme.desc: Ceaser and the crew are flying high on the new renovations, but when it's time to say "Bon voyage" to Dutchess, Ceaser begins having second thoughts about his former flame. Presented by VH1.

programme.title: Black Ink Crew
programme.desc: Ceaser takes Sky's advice to heart and decides to take a little trip across the globe to surprise Dutchess. While Ceaser and Dutchess spend time together in Paris, Quani tries to come to terms with her feelings about her husband, Puma. Presented by VH1.

programme.title: Black Ink Crew
programme.desc: Ceaser and Dutchess have returned from Paris as a couple and the crew wonders what this means for the future of the shop. Quani tells Puma that she wants a career and is pissed when Puma laughs it off. Presented by VH1.

programme.title: Black Ink Crew
programme.desc: Ceaser and Dutchess finally show up at the shop and Donna and Ceaser go at it. Walt reunites with his long lost family and O'S**t, still in rehab, receives frightening news. Presented by VH1.

programme.title: Black Ink Crew
programme.desc: With Anya in the hospital, O'S**t tries to fix his relationship. Sassy decides to introduce her new girlfriend to the crew. Meanwhile, Ceaser, Dutchess, & Ted go to Arizona to bring Sky home but find out Sky's facing 8 years in jail. Presented by VH1.

programme.title: Black Ink Crew
programme.desc: Ted's true feelings come to light upon Sky's 2-month sentence to Tent City, one of the most controversial jails in the world. Puma's business partner, Med, plays mediator trying to squash the beef and bring the old friends back together. Presented by VH1.

programme.title: Black Ink Crew
programme.desc: Quani and Puma are officially "turned up", causing them to miss the Black Ink photo shoot. O'S**t heads to court to find out the outcome of his gun charge. Quani curses out Ceaser, causing a full-blown riot on the streets of Harlem. Presented by VH1.

programme.title: Black Ink Crew
programme.desc: The pressure is on for Ceaser when Dutchess' parents arrive for their engagement party. Quani and Puma make it clear that this war isn't over. Sky struggles with the emotions she feels over leaving Tent City. Presented by VH1.

programme.title: Black Ink Crew
programme.desc: Sky is freed from Tent City andTed is waiting outside for her. When Kathie has DNA results in hand, O'Sh*t deals with his past. Puma creates a plan to protect his family but results in a full-out brawl on the streets of New York City. Presented by VH1.

programme.title: Black Ink Crew
programme.desc: In the wake of the fashion show incident, the crew works on rebuilding and proving that they are stronger than ever before. When Sassy shows up, Ceaser makes it clear that anyone associated with Puma is not allowed on his turf. Presented by VH1.

programme.title: Half & Half
programme.desc: When Spencer has trouble dumping his new girlfriend, he enlists Dee Dee's help breaking the news. After Phyllis's new boyfriend plans a romantic weekend away, she turns to an unlikely source for help with her sex life.

programme.title: Half & Half
programme.desc: Dee Dee invites Mona to a 'girl's weekend' at the spa, but Mona soon discovers her sister has an ulterior motive. Spencer's view of the gay world is changed when he spends the weekend with Adam's well connected friends.

programme.title: Half & Half
programme.desc: When Dee Dee complains her new co-worker, Brett, is questioning her ability to do her job because she is a woman, Charles and Spencer decide they need to intervene on her behalf.

programme.title: Hangin' With Mr. Cooper: Santa's Got a Brand New Bag
programme.desc: Mark and Geneva are saddened when Nicole stops believing in Santa. Then a mysterious cousin visits, who knows how to make Nicole happy.

programme.title: Hangin' With Mr. Cooper: Private School
programme.desc: Mark is assigned to teach Black history at an expensive private school for one week. When the principal offers him a job at a much higher salary, Mark has a big decision to make.

programme.title: Hangin' With Mr. Cooper: For Whom the Heck the Bell Tolls
programme.desc: Not wanting to admit that he can't remember a recently deceased basketball coach, Mark agrees to give the eulogy at his funeral.

programme.title: Hangin' With Mr. Cooper: It's My Party and I'll Die If I Want to
programme.desc: It is almost Mark's 30th birthday, and Tyler discovers a lump on Mark. After a misunderstanding with his doctor, Mark thinks that he is dying so he goes skydiving and gives away his stuff.

programme.title: Hangin' With Mr. Cooper: The Courtship of Mark Cooper
programme.desc: Mark is in the midst of defending himself in court when he realizes the plaintiff's lawyer is an ex-girlfriend he dumped brutally.

programme.title: Hangin' With Mr. Cooper: Wedding Bell Blues
programme.desc: When Mark's demanding employer, P.J., tells him she is going to marry her old boyfriend and quit her job, Mark has to decide if he should tell her a secret that could make her cancel the wedding. Queen Latifah guest stars and sings "Just Another Day.

programme.title: Hangin' With Mr. Cooper: Truth or Consequences
programme.desc: Mark and Vanessa make a bet on who can go the longest without telling a lie.

programme.title: Hangin' With Mr. Cooper: Trading Places
programme.desc: When Vanessa applies for a job at a conservative Christian radio station, she tells the manager that Mark is her husband and Geneva is her wild cousin.

programme.title: Everybody Hates Chris
programme.desc: When Julius and Rochelle decide to raise Mr. Omar's rent, Mr. Omar demands they bring the apartment up to code and moves in with Chris' family until the repairs are done.

programme.title: Everybody Hates Chris
programme.desc: Chris realizes that by helping the school's star running back and his friends with homework he is allowed to hang out with the cool kids. Greg tries to make him see that it's a bad idea.

programme.title: Everybody Hates Chris
programme.desc: When Doc's obnoxious new girlfriend, Stacy, makes Chris' life a living hell, Chris decides it's about time he split up the happy couple. Meanwhile, Tonya starts wearing a bra to get the attention of the boys in her class.

programme.desc: Although he is supposed to be home watching Drew and Tonya, Chris sneaks out to go to the movies with his friends and witnesses a shoot-out outside the theater.

programme.desc: 1930's New York. The black community of Harlem faces the same indignities as countless millions of refugees. If the seeds of Harlem's urban power would not grow in the White city, the Black underground would form to take control.

programme.title: One Night In Miami...
programme.desc: One Night in Miami' is a fictional account of one incredible night where American icons Muhammad Ali, Malcolm X, Sam Cooke, and Jim Brown gathered, discussing their roles in the civil rights movement and cultural upheaval of the 1960s.

programme.title: Blue Bloods (en español): Ni rendición, ni retirada
programme.desc: Después de que Reggie Wilson (Cyrus Farmer), un testigo en un caso anterior de Erin, le pide ayuda para desmantelar una operación de drogas en su edificio de apartamentos, ella se propone hacer que el edificio sea seguro para su familia.

programme.title: Blue Bloods (en español): Interferencia extranjera
programme.desc: Danny y Baez se unen con dos agentes rusos para buscar a un peligroso hombre ruso que ingresó a EE. UU. con una visa diplomática.

programme.title: Blue Bloods (en español): La delgada línea azul
programme.desc: Cuando Danny intercepta un envío de varios millones de dólares que estaba destinado a un cártel de drogas en México, se convierte en un blanco cuando ellos regresan en busca de venganza.

programme.title: Mentes criminales
programme.desc: Cuando dos guardias de una prisión privada de máxima seguridad en Texas son asesinados, la UAC presiente que más de un sospechoso dentro de la prisión podría estar involucrado.

programme.title: Mentes criminales
programme.desc: El UAC es convocado a Wisconsin en busca de un asesino serial, el equipo busca una conexión entre las víctimas para encontrar pistas del sospechoso. Además, Kate tiene dificultades para lidiar con su sobrina, Meg, cuando comienza a comportarse mal.

programme.title: Mentes criminales
programme.desc: Cuando la esposa de un prometedor congresista desaparece, la UAC investiga a sus enemigos políticos como posibles sospechosos.

programme.title: Mentes criminales
programme.desc: Cuando una familia de cuatro miembros es secuestrada durante unas vacaciones en Barbados, la UAC es convocada para asistir al jefe de la unidad Jack Garrett (Gary Sinise) y a su unidad internacional en su investigación.

programme.title: NCIS: Criminología Naval
programme.desc: El último acto de terrorismo a los cuarteles de NCIS perpetrado por Harper Dearing en el final de la temporada pasada, provoca que diferentes agencias se unan en su búsqueda.

programme.title: NCIS: Criminología Naval
programme.desc: El equipo investiga la causa de una misteriosa muerte que involucra a un empleado de armería de NCIS que fue descubierto cuatro meses después del atentado a los campos de la Marina.

programme.title: NCIS: Criminología Naval
programme.desc: Aún en su licencia médica, Ducky decide re abrir un caso de hace 12 años ordenando la exhumación de un comandante de la Marina.

programme.title: NCIS: Criminología Naval
programme.desc: El equipo de NCIS investiga el caso de un entrenamiento de helicóptero que termina en desastre en alta mar.

programme.title: Blue Bloods (en español): Poder absoluto
programme.desc: Danny y Báez investigan a un posible asesino en serie que le envía un mensaje escalofriante a Danny, y Erin juega con la idea de postularse para el puesto de juez.

programme.title: Blue Bloods (en español): La historia perfecta
programme.desc: Cuando el reportero Lorenzo Colt (Zachary Booth) es atacado mientras llevaba equipo de la policía de Nueva York en un paseo junto con Jamie y Eddie, Frank pone a Danny y Baez a la caza del tirador que puede estar buscando a otros miembros de la fuerza.

programme.title: Blue Bloods (en español): El peor de los escenarios
programme.desc: Frank se pone en alerta máxima cuando una amenaza a la ciudad de Nueva York puede ser inminente luego de un ataque terrorista en el Medio Oriente.

programme.title: Steve Austin's Broken Skull Challenge
programme.desc: Steve Austin challenges eight new female athletes with Snatch, High & Dry, and Rock Climb. In the end, one competitor will reign supreme and earn the right to take on Steve's Skullbuster for a shot at $10,000.

programme.title: Steve Austin's Broken Skull Challenge
programme.desc: Eight of the toughest bracket champions to have ever competed on the ranch return for another chance at victory. Two competitors will take on the Skullbuster, with the fastest time winning $25,000.

programme.title: Redneck Island
programme.desc: Steve Austin welcomes fifteen new rednecks to his tropical island to do battle for the $100,000 prize and the right to call themselves the reddest redneck of them all.

programme.title: Redneck Island
programme.desc: With the rednecks now in teams, previously formed alliances begin to break down.

programme.title: Redneck Island
programme.desc: With 13 Rednecks left, the teams become human slingshots to earn their right to stay on the island.

programme.title: Redneck Island
programme.desc: The teams are divided as the rednecks' guts and physical strength are put to the test.

programme.title: Redneck Island
programme.desc: The eleven remaining rednecks are put to the test after a grueling reckoning and with injuries and tempers flaring, one team is almost brought to its knees.

programme.title: Redneck Island
programme.desc: Life on the island finally becomes real after a shocking announcement, which leaves both teams in shambles. As a result, all hell breaks loose when secret alliances are exposed and other alliances are broken.

programme.title: Redneck Island
programme.desc: A battle of the sexes begins after one redneck blatantly goes against their alliance. After a challenge that has everyone scrambling to show their worth, the new pecking order within the group is clearly established.

programme.title: Redneck Island
programme.desc: Island life takes its toll on the seven remaining rednecks, especially the "all-girl alliance" which begins to crack under the strain of petty jealousies.

programme.title: Redneck Island
programme.desc: The competition heats up as the final five battle it out for a spot in the finale. The rednecks must endure a challenge full of ups and downs in order to receive a mouth-watering reward.

programme.title: Redneck Island
programme.desc: The starting field of fifteen rednecks is now down to the final four until a sudden elimination washes away one redneck's dream of being $100,000 richer.

programme.title: Trick My Truck
programme.desc: Matt Kolb is a proud grandfather and 32 year veteran of the road. Known as a kid at heart, Matt's always looking for a good time. But the bad economy and poor shape of his truck have this former wild child feeling down.

programme.title: Trick My Truck
programme.desc: Jeff White was a proud truck driver with 17 years of experience under his belt. But his career came to a stop when his daughter Amanda suffered severe injuries in a car accident.

programme.title: Trick My Truck
programme.desc: CMT's hit series TRICK MY TRUCK hammers down with brand new episodes as the crew's outrageous designs and attention to detail will leave every truck-loving man or woman envious.

programme.title: The Wonder List
programme.desc: Aired 03/01/2015. On these unspoiled islands, native tribes confront the factors that threaten the traditions of ancient people.

programme.title: The Wonder List
programme.desc: Aired 03/08/2015. The world’s leading naturalists fight to keep this precious natural habitat in balance and save critically-endangered species from extinction.

programme.title: The Wonder List
programme.desc: Aired 03/15/2015. The inhabitants of this remote Greek island live far longer than most Americans, but can they maintain their centuries-old way of life in the modern world?

programme.title: Lincoln: Divided We Stand
programme.desc: Aired 02/14/2021. Abraham Lincoln's life before political stardom, from his frontier roots to his courtship of Mary Todd Lincoln, who pushed him to great political heights.

programme.title: Lincoln: Divided We Stand
programme.desc: Aired 02/21/2021. Lincoln showed how poignant oration, political savvy and moral conviction could help a lawyer from Illinois ascend from obscurity to the White House.

programme.desc: Aired 05/05/2013. Chefs and restauranteurs Fred Morin and Dave McMillan, of Joe Beef’s, take us across Canada by rail.

programme.title: Anthony Bourdain: Parts Unknown
programme.desc: Aired 05/12/2013. Anthony Bourdain explores the "Interzone,” where artists like Burroughs, Bowles and the Rolling Stones sought escape from Western moral prohibitions.

programme.title: United Shades of America

programme.title: United Shades of America

programme.title: COPS
programme.desc: A motorcyclist tries to escape on foot, a couple's synthetic marijuana use catches up with them, and an officer tries to get the real story behind a domestic disturbance.

programme.title: COPS
programme.desc: Shots fired in a park after hours leads to a messy situation for one officer, and a disturbed man with a gun takes responding officers on a harrowing chase.

programme.title: COPS
programme.desc: Officers are dumbfounded when a man tries to talk them into taking him to jail. Sparks fly when a driver tries to take his truck on the freeway with only two wheels. Deputies are on guard when they approach a belligerent man.

programme.title: COPS
programme.desc: A sizable amount of cocaine is seized during a routine search. An officer responds to a domestic dispute call, in which there are conflicting stories at the scene. An officer’s patrol car is nearly struck by a train, twice.

programme.title: COPS
programme.desc: Officers are forced to use a taser to subdue a drunk driver. A man who claims he’s merely returning a bicycle to its owner is arrested for soliciting prostitution. Officers respond to a complex domestic disturbance call.

programme.title: COPS
programme.desc: Officers spot a suspect running down the street with a knife, the driver of a stolen car takes off on foot after he's pulled over, and police find carjacked vehicles.

programme.title: COPS
programme.desc: Police try to settle a dispute between roommates, a jilted man causes a disturbance at a public park twice in one day, and an erratic driver proves to be surprisingly sober.

programme.title: COPS
programme.desc: Several units are in pursuit of a stolen vehicle. A man is found unconscious behind the wheel of a car after he crashed into a tree. Officers intervene in domestic dispute between a stripper and her boyfriend.

programme.title: COPS
programme.desc: A woman tells officers she’s a vampire. Officers question a colorful man dressed as a woman. A violent woman screams obscenities at officers and needs to be restrained.

programme.title: COPS
programme.desc: Officers review dashcam footage after a suspect claims force was used against him unjustly, and a weed enthusiast drops some knowledge on police about the founding fathers.

programme.title: COPS
programme.desc: A man caught with a stolen moped attempts to run while handcuffed. Police find a man with his pants down behind a business. A suspect found asleep in his poorly parked car complains of sciatic pain.

programme.title: COPS
programme.desc: An unstable man in a standoff with officers begs to be shot, a drunk woman is accused of beating her spouse, and unwanted guests occupy the garage of an out-of-town homeowner.

programme.title: COPS
programme.desc: A motorcycle with no license plate crashes while fleeing from Deputies. A woman driving a car with no windshield blames her ex-boyfriend. A gun is found hidden in a seat during a traffic stop.

programme.title: COPS
programme.desc: An officer spots a suspect returning to an area to pick up a hidden stash of narcotics. An officer learns that occupants of a suspicious vehicle has outstanding warrants. A domestic battery is investigated and justice is served.

programme.title: COPS
programme.desc: Officers apprehend an individual with a saw-like knife. A man accused of auto theft claims his girlfriend allowed him to borrow her wheels. Chiquita the chihuahua helps its owner through hard times.

programme.title: COPS
programme.desc: Police pursue a fleeing vehicle through backyards, officers follow the trail of a suicidal man who may be armed, and a family argument over chips and dip leads to violence.

programme.title: COPS
programme.desc: A remorseful woman is arrested for lewd conduct during Mardi Gras. Police officers are dispatched into the busy streets of New Orleans during the super bowl in search of ticket scalpers. Police Department investigates a theft at a local store.

programme.title: COPS
programme.desc: A man arguing with his father over money fights with three Deputies after an unsuccessful Taser deployment. A motorcycle runs from cops in Fontana. A suspect in Alameda County rams a patrol vehicle.

programme.title: COPS
programme.desc: An uncooperative driver leads police on a high-speed chase, and an alleged convenience store robber in custody won't settle down until he gets a kiss from his girlfriend.

programme.title: COPS
programme.desc: Deputies chase a wanted man who makes a break for it, a man leads officers on a vehicle pursuit, and a routine traffic stop ends with an arrest.

programme.title: COPS
programme.desc: A suspect seen fleeing a vehicle refuses to admit he was ever in said vehicle, and police respond to a call that shots were fired.

programme.title: COPS
programme.desc: Torrential rain hampers the pursuit of a fleeing vehicle, a man on a moped is carrying more than he lets on, and a persistent police officer unravels a sketchy man's story.

programme.title: COPS
programme.desc: A female assailant attacks a woman after merely bumping into her. A woman is arrested for spilling beer on an unsuspecting cameraman’s expensive equipment. Two intoxicated women are placed under arrest after a physical altercation.

programme.title: COPS
programme.desc: An officer pulls over a man making hand gestures at him while driving, an ex-Marine explains his side of a fight, and a traffic stop reveals a truck full of dogs and drugs.

programme.title: COPS
programme.desc: A man blames the weed found in his car on his absent nephew, a suspect in custody starts to convulse, and police respond to a call about an armed man tripping on bath salts.

programme.title: COPS
programme.desc: Officers apprehend a skittish suspect, a father-to-be leads police on a foot chase, and police struggle to get the truth from a wanted man.

programme.title: COPS
programme.desc: Officers subdue an erratic man on a public an armed dispute quickly spoils a birthday celebration and deputies help break up a volatile domestic situation.

programme.title: CSI
programme.desc: A man driving with a wooden stake in his head dies in front of a casino.

programme.title: CSI
programme.desc: An elderly woman crashes her car into a crowded restaurant. One of the patrons is Sara's paramedic boyfriend. Grissom and Nick investigate the possible carbon monoxide murder of a woman in her home.

programme.title: CSI
programme.desc: Catherine, Nick, and Sara investigate a seemingly months old body found in the mountains.

programme.title: CSI
programme.desc: Grissom and Catherine investigate a movie-goer who was stabbed to death.

programme.title: CSI
programme.desc: Grissom and Catherine investigate the murder of a despised comic who died onstage, apparently after drinking from a tainted bottle of water.

programme.title: CSI
programme.desc: The trampling death of a trainer by her horse aboard a private jet is investigated by Grissom, Catherine, and Nick. Sara and Warrick look into a Romeo and Juliet scenario in the desert.

programme.title: CSI
programme.desc: Grissom, Sara, and Nick investigate the murder of a woman in the press box of a high school stadium.

programme.title: CSI
programme.desc: A professional bank robbery leads to the death of a detective. While investigating the case, Grissom deals with his hearing loss and another CSI gets a personal revelation.

programme.title: CSI
programme.desc: Two couples meet in a bar and one of the couples is murdered. When a second couple is murdered in a similar fashion the team suspects a pair of serial killers are on the loose.

programme.title: CSI
programme.desc: When the lead suspects in Grissom's serial killer case are murdered, Grissom suspects an inside job.

programme.title: CSI
programme.desc: Grissom and Warrick get the case of an elderly woman found mummified in her closet. Sara and Nick arrive to investigate a breaking and entering to find a raped teen.

programme.title: CSI
programme.desc: During the latest heatwave in Las Vegas, with triple-digit temperatures, Gil and Catherine investigate a baby locked in a car.

programme.title: CSI
programme.desc: The team is introduced to the Furry side of Vegas when a man is found dead on the side of the road, dressed in a raccoon suit.

programme.title: CSI
programme.desc: A severed head is shipped to Dr. Robbins from Jackpot, Nevada. Grissom goes to Jackpot to find the rest of the body and gets very little cooperation from the locals.

programme.title: CSI
programme.desc: Warrick es acusado de asesinar a un famoso gángster de Las Vegas e incluso él no está seguro de su culpabilidad o inocencia.

programme.title: CSI
programme.desc: Dos parejas se encuentran en un bar y una de ellas es asesinada. Cuando una segunda pareja es asesinada de forma similar, el equipo sospecha que una pareja de asesinos en serie anda suelta.

programme.title: CSI
programme.desc: Cuando los principales sospechosos del caso del asesino en serie de Grissom son asesinados, Grissom sospecha que se trata de un trabajo desde dentro.

programme.title: CSI
programme.desc: Grissom y Warrick se ocupan del caso de una anciana encontrada momificada en su armario. Sara y Nick llegan a investigar un allanamiento de morada para encontrar a una adolescente violada.

programme.title: CSI
programme.desc: Durante la última ola de calor de Las Vegas, con temperaturas de tres dígitos, Gil y Catherine investigan a un bebé encerrado en un coche.

programme.title: CSI
programme.desc: El equipo se introduce en el lado Furry de Las Vegas cuando un hombre es encontrado muerto a un lado de la carretera, vestido con un traje de mapache.

programme.title: CSI
programme.desc: Una cabeza cortada es enviada al Dr. Robbins desde Jackpot, Nevada. Grissom va a Jackpot para encontrar el resto del cuerpo y obtiene muy poca cooperación de los lugareños.

programme.title: CSI
programme.desc: La comparecencia de Warrick en la vista preliminar de un caso de violación y asesinato sale terriblemente mal cuando la única prueba es desestimada por un tecnicismo.

programme.title: CSI
programme.desc: El encaprichamiento de un sospechoso con Catherine hace que ésta se haga cargo de un caso de alto perfil.

programme.title: CSI
programme.desc: El sheriff está sometido a presiones políticas para que descubra quién mató a un comisario aéreo con un coche bomba del que el sheriff fue testigo.

programme.title: CSI
programme.desc: Un adolescente aparece asesinado en una obra en construcción. Grissom, Sara y Warrick siguen la pista de la sangre en un martillo.

programme.title: CSI
programme.desc: El único miembro del jurado que se resistía a votar aparece muerto en la sala del jurado. Los once jurados que votaban culpable y que odiaban al jurado muerto son los sospechosos naturales.

programme.title: CSI
programme.desc: Una mujer aparece asesinada en su casa. Su parecido con Sara hace que Grissom se interese personalmente por el caso y le obliga a examinar las decisiones que ha tomado en su vida.

programme.title: CSI
programme.desc: Grissom, Sara y Nick responden a una electrocución en un casino. El casino alberga antigüedades japonesas. La electrocución no es más que una treta para robar la pieza central de la exposición.

programme.title: CSI: Miami
programme.desc: When a sports legend is murdered, the investigation hits a snag when the lab loses the body. Horatio and the CSI team investigate.

programme.title: CSI: Miami
programme.desc: Bizarre occurrences begin to plague the CSIs as they hunt down a serial killer who struck during a total eclipse of the sun.

programme.title: CSI: Miami
programme.desc: When a model is electrocuted on the runway, the case leads Horatio and the CSI team back to Horatio’s son and his nemesis.

programme.title: CSI: Miami
programme.desc: When a family vacation turns deadly, the CSIs must find the killer before the survivors take justice into their own hands.

programme.title: CSI: Miami
programme.desc: An attempt on Calleigh's life puts both her professional and personal life in jeopardy. Horatio and the CSI team investigate.

programme.title: CSI: Miami
programme.desc: Lifestyles of the rich and famous come under the microscope of Horatio and the CSI team when a wealthy family's nanny turns up dead.

programme.title: CSI: Miami
programme.desc: When a rare and illegal machine gun vaporizes three weapons' smugglers, the CSIs must find the killer before the gun causes more deaths.

programme.title: CSI: Miami
programme.desc: Horatio's ex, and Kyle's mother, resurfaces in Miami as a billionaire's widow who will do anything at all to get her son back.

programme.title: CSI: Miami
programme.desc: While investigating the murder of a woman, the CSIs uncover a meth lab in her apartment and an unscrupulous FBI agent with a secret life of his own.

programme.title: CSI: Miami
programme.desc: Horatio and the CSI team investigate a murder at a wedding, the clues eventually lead the CSI team to a local strip club.

programme.title: CSI: Miami
programme.desc: Horatio's past comes back to haunt him when Julia has him arrested for murder. The CSI team must investigate to clear him.

programme.title: CSI: Miami
programme.desc: Horatio deals with ghosts from his past, the team races against time to save Calleigh from a group of dangerous kidnappers.

programme.title: CSI: Miami
programme.desc: Horatio and the CSI team must act quickly to stop a vigilante who has been on a killing spree, targeting Internet predators.

programme.title: CSI: Miami
programme.desc: A body in a sinkhole leads Horatio and the CSI team to a robbery, while investigating they discover the target holds a shocking secret.

programme.title: CSI: Miami
programme.desc: Cuando golpean casi hasta la muerte a una ex-víctima de violación, Horacio debe entrar al mundo de las cárceles y las personas en libertad condicional para encontrar al culpable.

programme.title: CSI: Miami
programme.desc: Cuando un robo/homicidio deja a dos hombres muertos y a un tercero aún con vida, Horacio está decidido a averiguar qué sucedió realmente.

programme.title: CSI: Miami
programme.desc: Todd Burton está tratando de salir de la furia del huracán cuando mata a un hombre en medio de una tormenta que le impide ver y ahora lo acusan de homicidio vehicular involuntario.

programme.title: CSI: Miami
programme.desc: Un gasista se ve envuelto en llamas invisibles y muere. Todo esto sucede durante una carrera clasificatoria del Gran Premio de las Américas.

programme.title: CSI: Miami
programme.desc: Horatio finalmente cierra el caso del asesinato de su hermano. Se reencuentra con Suzie, una ex-drogadicta que estuvo involucrada con su hermano.

programme.title: CSI: Miami
programme.desc: Después de que ven a una mujer siendo atacada por un tiburón, el equipo de CSI descubre que fue asesinada antes de ser arrojada al agua.

programme.title: CSI: Miami
programme.desc: Una joven es arrojada por la barandilla de un estacionamiento, la investigación sobre su muerte revela pruebas de que la asesinaron antes de la caída.

programme.title: CSI: Miami
programme.desc: Después de que encuentran muerto a un anestesiólogo de cirugía plástica por un aparente suicidio, Horatio cree que podría ser un caso de asesinato.

programme.title: CSI: Miami
programme.desc: Un corredor de diamantes es asesinado a tiros en un estacionamiento, un hombre con discapacidad mental presenció el asesinato y quiere ayudar a Horatio a resolver el crimen.

programme.title: CSI: Miami
programme.desc: Cuando asesinan a un hombre, Juan Marco Varón, que puede haber torturado o no a refugiados cubanos, llaman al equipo de CSI para investigar.

programme.title: CSI: Miami

programme.desc: Basada en una historia real, Dwayne Johnson interpreta a un detective de la policía de Nueva York que intenta resolver el mayor robo de dinero de la historia de Estados Unidos.

programme.title: El gángster
programme.desc: En la Nueva York de la década de 1920, la comunidad negra de Harlem enfrenta las mismas indignidades que millones de refugiados. Tres líderes de grupos rivales (Laurence Fishhburne, Tim Roth y Andy García) luchan por controlar el poder urbano de Harlem.

programme.title: Juego letal
programme.desc: Ambientado en un mundo futuro donde los humanos pueden controlar a otros humanos en juegos en línea, un jugador estrella (Butler) de un juego llamado "Slayers" busca recuperar su independencia mientras acaba con la mente maestra del juego (Hall ).

programme.title: Peligro en Bangkok
programme.desc: Joe (Nicolas Cage) es un asesino profesional que aterriza en Bangkok para ocuparse de unas obligaciones y se encuentra inesperadamente entrenando a un joven protegido y enamorándose de una mujer que desconoce su verdadero trabajo.

programme.title: Actos de venganza
programme.desc: Un abogado de hablar rápido (Antonio Banderas) transforma su cuerpo y toma un voto de silencio, que no se romperá hasta que descubra quién mató a su esposa e hija y tenga su venganza.

programme.title: Narc: Calles peligrosas
programme.desc: Jason Patric es Nick Tellis, un oficial de narcóticos suspendido que debe investigar el asesinato de Michael Calvess, un policía novato que murió por circunstancias dudosas.

programme.title: Terminator 2: juicio final
programme.desc: La máquina no humana que domina la élite del futuro devastado por la guerra despacha un cíborg asesino al pasado para matar a un jovencito porque pronto será el líder de la resistencia en contra de la máquina.

programme.title: Ya veremos
programme.desc: Los padres de Santi están divorciados, y él está acostumbrado a vivir con ellos pero por separado. Tras una urgente cirugía para salvar su vista, Santi decide hacer una lista de deseos por cumplir pero con sus padres unidos.

programme.title: Neruda
programme.desc: At the start of the Cold War, subversive Chilean senator and poet Pablo Neruda is pursued by police prefect Oscar Peluchonneau. Unable to flee the country, Neruda goes into hiding and becomes a symbol of liberty at home and in Europe.

programme.title: El que busca encuentra
programme.desc: Esperanza y Marcos son dos personas que creen en el destino y en el amor verdadero.

programme.title: Ladrón que roba ladrón
programme.desc: A un par de ladrones profesionales se les complica su plan para robar a un millonario, después de que los mejores miembros de su equipo habitual, abandonan el plan. Los ladrones se verán forzados a contratar a novatos para completar el trabajo.

programme.title: Ladrones
programme.desc: Fernando Colunga y Eduardo Yáñez lideran las risas como los Robin Hoods modernos en esta tremendamente entretenida secuela del gran éxito "Ladrón que roba a ladrón".

programme.title: Me late chocolate
programme.desc: Después de que su prometido muere inesperadamente, una mujer decide aceptar la vida y seguir su sueño de trabajar con chocolate.

programme.title: Ladrón que roba ladrón
programme.desc: A un par de ladrones profesionales se les complica su plan para robar a un millonario, después de que los mejores miembros de su equipo habitual, abandonan el plan. Los ladrones se verán forzados a contratar a novatos para completar el trabajo.

programme.title: Estación zombi
programme.desc: Una desgarradora película de terror y suspenso zombi, que sigue a un grupo de pasajeros aterrorizados que se abren camino a través de un brote viral en todo el país.

programme.title: Hellraiser III: El infierno en la tierra
programme.desc: La vida de una ambiciosa reportera de televisión cambia para siempre tras ser testigo de la muerte de un adolescente. En su viaje por descubrir la verdad, encuentra una caja de rompecabezas extraña que revela un mundo demoniaco de placer y dolor.

programme.title: Habitación Ouija
programme.desc: Una mujer agorafóbica comienza a convocar espíritus para que sean sus amigos mientras su hermano / cuidador no está durante el día, pero cuanto más tiempo pasa con los espíritus, más claro se vuelve que no son tan amigables después de todo.

programme.title: Vestida Para Matar
programme.desc: Sherlock Holmes persigue a un trío de villanos asesinos.

programme.title: Hellraiser IV: Línea de sangre
programme.desc: En el año 2127 el Doctor Merchant, a bordo de una estación espacial intentará cumplir una misión devisiva: acabar con los cenobitas para cerrar las puertas del infierno para siempre. Esta misión podría ser la confrontación final con Pinhead.

programme.title: Hellraiser: Inferno
programme.desc: Un turbio detective de Los Ángeles se pierde en un mundo de pesadilla del mal cuando resuelve la misteriosa caja-puzle que libera al diabólico demonio, Pinhead.

programme.title: Hellraiser: La puerta del infierno
programme.desc: Pinhead regresa en el siguiente escalofriante capítulo del electrizante legado de “Hellraiser”, creado por el escritor de terror más vendido (y director de cine original) Clive Barker.

programme.title: Cine terror
programme.desc: no info available

programme.title: Hellraiser: Hellworld
programme.desc: Cuando cinco fanáticos de los videojuegos son invitados a una fiesta especial de un misterioso destino conocido como Hellworld, sufren una noche de terror indescriptible que va más allá del ciberespacio.

programme.title: Último viaje a Las Vegas
programme.desc: Cuatro mejores amigos de toda la vida van a Las Vegas para dejar de portarse como adultos de su edad y revivir sus días de gloria. Al llegar, se dan cuenta de que las décadas transformaron Sin City y pusieron a prueba su amistad de manera impensada.

programme.title: Viaje censurado
programme.desc: Cuatro amigos emprenden un viaje de 3000 kilómetros para recuperar un video ilícito enviado por error a una amiga.

programme.title: Ocho cabezas

programme.title: Un funeral de murte
programme.desc: Esta estrafalaria comedia británica nos muestra con un humor negro azabache la miríada de escandalosas calamidades que asuelan a un excéntrico clan inglés, que guarda unos cuantos muertos en el armario, cuando el patriarca muere inesperadamente.

programme.title: Instinto fatal

programme.title: ¿Solo amigos?

programme.title: Una extraña pareja, otra vez
programme.desc: Oscar Madison y Félix Ungar son invitados a la boda de sus hijos Brucey y Hannah, respectivamente. Por lo que deciden viajar juntos a Los Angeles para llegar a la boda de sus hijos. Pero a pesar del tiempo siguen siendo una extraña pareja.

programme.title: Un Ratoncito Duro De Cazar

programme.desc: The team investigates a suspected human trafficking ring; Hotchner suggests changes are coming; J.J. returns to the team.

programme.title: Criminal Minds

programme.title: Criminal Minds

programme.title: Criminal Minds

programme.title: Criminal Minds

programme.desc: When an UnSub targets the BAU, the team goes into action to find out who is responsible.

programme.title: Criminal Minds

programme.title: Steins;Gate

programme.title: Steins;Gate

programme.title: Steins;Gate
programme.desc: Okabe, desperate to prevent the tragedy he's already seen happen, summons the courage for a daring Time Leap to try saving the life of his oldest and dearest companion.

programme.title: Steins;Gate
programme.desc: Despite his many attempts, Okabe fails to prevent the death of Mayuri, so he turns to Makise for help solving the riddle of time travel; Suzuha's true identity gets revealed.

programme.title: Steins;Gate
programme.desc: Suzuha reveals the harrowing truth about state of society in the year 2036, and the lab members work together to help find her father and prevent the rise of SERN.

programme.title: Steins;Gate
programme.desc: Daru somehow manages to repair the time machine, and Suzuha learns the truth about her long-lost father before traveling back to 1975 for one final, desperate attempt to change the future.

programme.title: Yuyu Hakusho
programme.desc: Team Urameshi must fight Team Masho; with Kuwabara injured, Yusuke and Kurama will have to battle the entire team without help.

programme.title: Yuyu Hakusho
programme.desc: It turns out that the fighters of Team Masho are the Shinobi of Spirit World, an ancient ninja faction; thanks to Gama's curse, Kurama has to battle the Ice Master Touya without using his body or energy.

programme.title: Robotech
programme.desc: Rook meets Dusty Ayres, a human experimented upon by the Invid who seeks revenge on the people he holds responsible.

programme.title: Crímenes imperfectos
programme.desc: En 1995, Denise O'Neill, una mesera de Palm Beach, es secuestrada y asesinada. Su vecino, Luis Caballero, levanta sospechas por su comportamiento extraño hacia los equipos de TV que cubren el crimen.

programme.title: Crímenes imperfectos
programme.desc: Un asesino en serie andaba suelto y la policía tenía que encontrarlo antes de que atacara nuevamente. Su pista más prometedora era inusual: una huella dactilar sangrienta en el cuerpo de una de las víctimas.

programme.title: Crímenes imperfectos: Asesino forestal
programme.desc: Un asesino intentó incinerar y destruir todo lo que pudiera relacionarlo con su crimen.

programme.title: Crímenes imperfectos
programme.desc: Cuando se encuentra a un popular profesor de gimnasia muerto por lo que parece ser una herida de bala accidental, su familia se pone sospechosa.

programme.title: Crímenes imperfectos
programme.desc: Cuando se encuentra muerta a Wanda Mason, empleada de una tienda, los investigadores descubren que la cámara de seguridad de la tienda ha captado todo el asesinato.

programme.title: Crímenes imperfectos
programme.desc: Cuando la casa de un policía se incendia, los expertos sospechan de un incendio provocado. El oficial cuya casa fue incendiada arresta al narcotraficante de bajo nivel James Wren, quien confiesa.

programme.title: Crímenes imperfectos
programme.desc: En 2006, Darlene Vander Giesen recibió correos electrónicos amenazantes y luego desapareció. Rastrear los correos electrónicos llevó a la policía a la casa de Daphne Wright, donde creen que se cometió un asesinato.

programme.title: Crímenes imperfectos: El infiel
programme.desc: Walter Notheis, Jr. era mejor conocido al público Americano como el entretenedor, Walter Scott, vocalista principal de la banda, Bob Kuban and the In-Men. Walter no sabía que la canción sería una premonición de los eventos que llevarían a su muerte.

programme.title: Crímenes imperfectos
programme.desc: Una peluquera joven y atractiva fue agredida sexualmente y asesinada en su propio salón de belleza. La evidencia en la escena del crimen no coincidió con ninguno de los sospechosos y, después de la investigación inicial, el caso se archivó por diez años.

programme.title: Crímenes imperfectos
programme.desc: Cuando se reporta la desaparición de una estudiante universitaria, la policía cree que su investigación será como muchas otras. Pero cuando descubren salpicaduras de sangre en la habitación de su novio, saben que este caso será diferente.

programme.title: Crímenes imperfectos
programme.desc: El Septiembre de 1984, en un suburbio de Tucson, Arizona, Vicki Hoskins, de ocho años, salió de su casa en su bicicleta rosada para enviar una carta a su madre. Ella nunca regresó, pero su bicicleta ligeramente dañada fue encontrada en las cercanías.

programme.title: Crímenes imperfectos: Llamado desde Casa
programme.desc: Una investigación de asesinato en Florida atraviesa jurisdicciones de New York y Jamaica.

programme.title: Crímenes imperfectos
programme.desc: Una mujer desaparece y su esposo se convierte en el principal sospechoso – especialmente después de que la policía encuentra una gran mancha de sangre en la alfombra de su habitación.

programme.title: Crímenes imperfectos
programme.desc: En 2005, David Castor sufrió una muerte lenta y agonizante durante varios días. Su esposa Stacey sostuvo que fue un suicidio, a pesar de que se hizo con un anticongelante.

programme.title: Crímenes imperfectos
programme.desc: Fue el accidente automovilístico más mortal en la historia de los Estados Unidos. Casi un centenar de vehículos participaron, doce personas murieron y más de cincuenta resultaron heridas.

programme.title: Crímenes imperfectos
programme.desc: La víctima había ingerido una gran cantidad de cianuro. Una pista muy improbable: una falla en el sobre de correo, expuso a un asesino que estaba dispuesto a matar a gente inocente.

programme.title: Crímenes imperfectos
programme.desc: Cuando se encuentra a Joann Katrinak muerta en un campo de maíz con su hijo pequeño, el sospechoso más obvio es el esposo y padre de las víctimas.

programme.title: Crímenes imperfectos
programme.desc: En 1987, se descubrieron un cráneo humano y algunos huesos en un campamento de niños exploradores cerca de Farmington, Missouri. La reconstrucción facial ayuda a los investigadores en este caso.

programme.title: Crímenes imperfectos
programme.desc: En 1996, Derrick Duehren regresó para encontrar su casa en Oregon hecha cenizas. Los restos calcinados de su esposa se encontraron luego en los escombros. Los investigadores intentaron determinar si fue un accidente desafortunado o un asesinato.

programme.title: Crímenes imperfectos
programme.desc: Una niña de doce años reclama que ha sido secuestrada y abusada sexualmente. Ella contó lo que había pasado con voz calma, sin alteraciones ni emociones, lo que hizo difícil que la policía le creyera.

programme.title: Crímenes imperfectos
programme.desc: La policía sospecha del Dr. John Jack Boyle en la desaparición de su esposa, Noreen, cuando firma los papeles de la hipoteca de una nueva casa con una mujer que se hace pasar por su esposa.

programme.title: Crímenes imperfectos: A Prueba de Fuego
programme.desc: Un pirómano en serie inicia varios incendios que causan daños por un valor de millones de dólares y la muerte de tres personas. Él es descubierto, en parte, mediante el uso de hipnosis forense.

programme.title: Crímenes imperfectos
programme.desc: Los doctores no saben por qué un científico joven se ha enfermado muy gravemente. Cuando las pruebas revelan finalmente la causa, es muy tarde para salvarlo.

programme.title: Crímenes imperfectos
programme.desc: Cuando una mujer desaparece, los amigos y familia se proponen encontrarla. Sus peores miedos se confirman semanas después cuando se descubre su cuerpo.

programme.title: Crímenes imperfectos
programme.desc: Cuando una niña de 9 años desaparece, la policía y los voluntarios pasan semanas buscándola.

programme.title: Crímenes imperfectos
programme.desc: Cuando Ryan Stallings, de cuatro meses, muere en circunstancias sospechosas, su madre finalmente es condenada por su asesinato. Pero meses después, surgen nuevas pruebas de una fuente sorprendente – su hermano recién nacido.

programme.title: Crímenes imperfectos: Viktorioso
programme.desc: Tres homicidios en dos continentes parecían ejecuciones profesionales. Los investigadores de ambos lados del Atlántico necesitaban averiguar si estaban relacionados.
